deviations.description: The process model enforces assessment and recording the reason in the system after 15 minutes if the donor is still bleeding or experiencing pain, but Version 2 only requires assessment after 20 minutes and only for bleeding. The process continues to enforce the stricter, outdated requirement.
The process model requires action for both bleeding and pain, but Version 2 only requires action for bleeding. The process unnecessarily enforces assessment for pain.
The process model triggers assessment after 15 minutes, but Version 2 only requires assessment after 20 minutes. The process enforces an earlier intervention than required.
The process model obligates recording the reason in the system, but Version 2 removes this obligation. The process continues to enforce an outdated documentation requirement.
